title: Sprint 54 Wave A: Act on LLM replan recommendation in TryLlmReplanOnStallAsync
description: TryLlmReplanOnStallAsync currently calls ILlmEvaluator.EvaluateAsync and logs the result but does NOT act on it. When shouldReplan==true: (a) extend ILlmEvaluator to return an EvaluationResult with a suggestion string, (b) parse the LLM's suggestion for specific remediation (skip block #N, step back, retry), (c) clear+replan or inject remediation action accordingly. Also extend the LLM prompt to ask for a specific remediation action in the JSON response.
